zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cornwallis於1490年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛時，他的父親William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath30歲，母親Elizabeth Stanford25歲。他和Mary Sulyard至少有1個女兒。他去世於1544年4月23日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙安享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cornwallis于1490年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛时，他的父亲William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath30岁，母亲Elizabeth Stanford25岁。他和Mary Sulyard至少有1个女儿。他去世于1544年4月23日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾沙安享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwallis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: regional name for someone from Cornwall, a Normanized form of Middle English Cornwalish. Compare Cornwall .

variants.name: Cornwall
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornish
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from the county of Cornwall, from Middle English Cornish, Cornysh formed on the analogy of English, which was usually Normanized as Corneys. Not surprisingly, the surname is common in adjacent Devon, but it is also established as far afield as Suffolk and London.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Cornwallis was born in 1490, in Brome, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Stanford, was 25. He had at least 1 daughter with Mary Sulyard. He died on 23 April 1544, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cornwallis est né en 1490, à Brome, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stanford, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mary Sulyard. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1544, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cornwallis 1490 in Brome, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stanford 25. Er hatte mit Mary Sulyard mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. April 1544 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cornwallis è nato il nel 1490 nel Brome, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stanford, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mary Sulyard. Morì il 23 aprile 1544, nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cornwallisが1490年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブロメで生まれた時，父William Cornwallis Knight of the Bathは30歳，母Elizabeth Stanfordは25歳であった。彼はMary Sulyardとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1544年4月23日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cornwallis(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브롬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stanford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mary Sulyard(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cornwallis nasceu em 1490, em Brome, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stanford, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mary Sulyard. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1544, em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cornwallis родился в 1490 г. в местности бром, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stanford, 25. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mary Sulyard. Он умер 23 апреля 1544 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cornwallis nació en 1490, en Brome, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Cornwallis Knight of the Bath, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stanford, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Mary Sulyard. Murió el 23 de abril de 1544, en Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
